query:
SELECT 
  'Bridge Academy GED' as program,
  COUNT(*) as total_lessons,
  SUM(CASE WHEN content IS NOT NULL AND content != '' AND LENGTH(content) > 1000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as complete_lessons,
  SUM(CASE WHEN content IS NULL OR content = '' OR LENGTH(content) <= 1000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as incomplete_lessons
FROM lessons 
WHERE courseId IN (SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code LIKE 'GED%' OR title LIKE '%GED%' OR title LIKE '%Bridge%');
